case_title: RICHARD S CHARNEY VS. QING XIA LIANG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ZHI MING LIANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-19-2013 AT 3:30 PM.
STIPULATION IN RE: CONTINUANCE OF HEARING DATE FILED BY RESPONDENT CHARNEY, RICHARD S

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHARNEY, RICHARD S RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LIANG, QING XIA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $247.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,247.50, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT ON 4/19/2013. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2013 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 4/19/2013 (FILED MAY 30, 2013) REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JPT ROBERT F. KANE, CLERK J. KONG, REPORTER TAMARA E. KEEN CSR# 5404 , D525.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHARNEY, RICHARD S AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, QING XIA LIANG, ZHI MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHARNEY, RICHARD S
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARNEY, RICHARD S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, QING XIA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $247.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,247.50, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT ZHI MING LIANG. DEFENDANT ZHI MING LIANG SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT FOUND THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE CANNOT BE COMPLETELY RESTORED EVEN AFTER REPAIRS ARE MADE. SEE MERCHART SHIPPERS VS. KELLOGG (1946) 28 CAL.2D 584,600. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
